info.title: EVzone Ride – Rides & Logistics API
info.description: Unified EVzone Ride and Logistics backend for ride-hailing, deliveries, tourist vehicles, ambulances, car rental, Fleet Partner, Agent/Dispatcher, Admin, school-fleet synchronization and CorporatePay integration. Version 10 adds the universal dispatch-unit domain, policy engine, auditable decision data, concurrency-safe assignment models and transactional dispatch outbox foundations.

token.description: Provider token; encrypted at rest and never returned
